extDesc.message: Audit DMCA complaint history against your domains via Google Transparency Report. Watchlist, sender forensics, counter-notice templates. No account required.

emptyWatchlist.message: No domains yet. Add your first domain above.

unsupportedPage.message: This page type is not supported

welcomeSub.message: Full history of DMCA complaints against your domains — audit and pattern detection.

welcomeFreshnessBody.message: Data comes from Google Transparency Report, which Google updates approximately once per month. What you see here is typically 30–60 days behind real-time events. Use this to audit history and spot patterns — not to catch complaints as they happen.

welcomeDomainNote.message: No account, no token required. Google Transparency Report is public.

welcomeDoneDesc.message: Your monitor is ready. Open the side panel to manage the watchlist or check the current site.

welcomeLumenHint.message: Lumen Database secondary enrichment (per-URL lists, richer sender forensics) is available in Settings → Advanced for users with a researcher token.
